title: Asking for directions
description: Find your way around HK — ask a stranger for help getting to the MTR
context: Hong Kong streets can be confusing — overpasses, underground malls, and MTR exits with letters A1 through E. Most locals are happy to help with directions, especially if you try in Cantonese. Saying 唔該 (m4 goi1) before asking is essential politeness.
cultural_note: Hong Kong has no street grid. The same address might sit on an elevated walkway, down a hillside staircase, or inside a shopping mall that passes straight through a building. Locals navigate by landmarks (opposite the 7-Eleven, up one floor), not compass points or street numbers.

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 唔該，請問去旺角地鐵站點行？
lines.jyutping: m4 goi1, cing2 man6 heoi3 wong6 gok3 dei6 tit3 zaam6 dim2 haang4?
lines.english: Excuse me, how do I get to Mongkok MTR station?

lines.speaker: stranger
lines.cjk: 直行，過咗個天橋再左轉。
lines.jyutping: zik6 haang4, gwo3 zo2 go3 tin1 kiu4 zoi3 zo2 zyun3.
lines.english: Go straight, then turn left after the pedestrian bridge.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: hai6 mai6 haang4 soeng5 tin1 kiu4 go2 dou6 aa3?
lines.english: Do I go up onto the footbridge there?

lines.speaker: stranger
lines.cjk: 係，上咗天橋落返嚟再左轉，行五分鐘度。
lines.jyutping: hai6, soeng5 zo2 tin1 kiu4 lok6 faan1 lai4 zoi3 zo2 zyun3, haang4 ng5 fan1 zung1 dou2.
lines.english: Yes, over the bridge, back down, then turn left. About five minutes.

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 唔好意思，我學緊廣東話，聽唔晒。可唔可以講慢啲？
lines.jyutping: m4 hou2 ji3 si1, ngo5 hok6 gan2 gwong2 dung1 waa2, teng1 m4 saai3. ho2 m4 ho2 ji5 gong2 maan6 di1?
lines.english: Sorry, I'm still learning Cantonese and didn't catch all of that. Could you say it more slowly?

lines.speaker: stranger
lines.cjk: 冇問題！直行，左轉，五分鐘。
lines.jyutping: mou5 man6 tai4! zik6 haang4, zo2 zyun3, ng5 fan1 zung1.
lines.english: No problem! Straight, turn left, five minutes.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: zan1 hai6 m4 goi1 saai3 nei5!
lines.english: Thank you so much, I really appreciate it!

lines.speaker: stranger
lines.jyutping: m4 sai2 haak3 hei3, maan6 maan2 haang4!
lines.english: No worries at all — take your time!
